description: Measure-my-hand size with the realistic US vacuum-plug vector (straight-sided plug 34 wide x 16 thick at both stations, 38 mm long, 5 mm cord, Decora plate, 22 mm finger / 88 mm hand). Pins the measurement-driven path away from the Medium parity point; the same vector is checked formula-level by tests/test_fit_derivations.py.
